notableEvents.label: Kyle Isbel GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Kyle Isbel grounds into a double play, second baseman Luke Keaschall to shortstop Orlando Arcia to first baseman Kody Clemens. Nick Loftin out at 2nd. Kyle Isbel out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Tristan Gray singles on a bunt ground ball to pitcher Michael Wacha. Alex Jackson to 3rd. Alex Jackson advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by pitcher Michael Wacha.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
